subtasks.description: Get vendor risk scores by querying vendor reliability data, then classify each vendor as low_risk, medium_risk, or high_risk based on incident history.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, COUNT(*) AS total_invoices, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' OR (paid_date IS NOT NULL AND paid_date > due_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS incident_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' OR (paid_date IS NOT NULL AND paid_date > due_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS risk_score, CASE WHEN 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' OR (paid_date IS NOT NULL AND paid_date > due_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) < 10 THEN 'low_risk' WHEN 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' OR (paid_date IS NOT NULL AND paid_date > due_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) < 30 THEN 'medium_risk' ELSE 'high_risk' END AS risk_classification FROM invoice_facts GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY risk_score DESC
